name: Gold Line Proposal
tagline: Charcoal and gold proposal deck rebuilt into a complete premium project proposal sequence with framed title pages, thin line geometry, tables, budget, timeline, maps, mockups, and decision layouts.

palette.description: Charcoal canvas with thin gold line geometry, warm cream text, and muted executive neutrals.

typography.style: Luxury all-caps serif display with compact modern sans body, matching the premium proposal source more closely than the prior condensed sans.

best_for: Premium project proposals, executive concepts, procurement presentations, and serious service pitches that need budget, requirement, timeline, map, mockup, and decision pages.
avoid_for: Playful campaigns, classroom materials, casual portfolios, or dense scientific explainers.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Custal Project Proposal
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview structure: dark premium proposal styling, thin gold line geometry, boxed title frames, sections for company, project, requirements, budget, stages, maps, tables, timelines, mockups, future, and decision. It does not reuse source presentation assets.
